input.headline: Andy Burnham may be King of the North, but could he rule No 10?

raw.headline: Andy Burnham may be King of the North, but could he rule No 10?

winner: Why did Andy Burnham bring a ladder to Downing Street? Because he heard the job was *Number 10*, and he didn’t want to trip over his own ambition!

candidates.text: Why did Andy Burnham bring a ladder to Downing Street? He heard they were looking for someone with *height* in the role!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'height' (literal and metaphorical), references Andy Burnham's title and the political context, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did Andy Burnham bring a ladder to Downing Street? Because he heard the job was *Number 10*, and he didn’t want to trip over his own ambition!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay on 'Number 10' and 'trip over his own ambition,' with good specificity to the headline and natural humor."}

candidates.text: Andy Burnham said he'd love to move into Number Ten, so I bought him a set of stairs and told him to climb them if he really wanted the job.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "Creative and specific reference to Andy Burnham's potential move into No 10, with a humorous twist involving stairs."}

candidates.text: He’s great at running Manchester, so if he ever decides to run Downing Street, I’m sure it’ll just be more of the same—lots of buses and a few very confused people in suits.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific (referencing Manchester and Downing Street), and uses a clever play on 'lots of buses' (a nod to the famous 'bus shelter' incident). It's surprising and funny without being offensive or generic."}

candidates.text: Andy Burnham might not have the crown, but at least he won’t have to share his tea with the royal corgis.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and uses a clever twist on the royal corgis, but it lacks full surprise and the connection to ruling No 10 is weak. The humor is mild and could be more impactful."}
